text: T_C: simulate a Burgers bore in u (u_L=1, u_R=0, width 0.5 at x=0) interacting with a bright NLS soliton in N (sech^2 at x=-8, amplitude 1) phase-boosted by phi_x=0.6 (rightward). Final time T=8.0. Does the soliton transmit, reflect, get captured, or get destroyed by the bore? Does ||m||_2 decrease (compound-soliton attractor)? Need: N peak>=0.3 at T=8, |u|<5, bore stable.

ic: u: smoothed Burgers bore u_L=1->u_R=0 at x=0, width 0.5; N: sech^2(x+8); phi: 0.6*x. kappa=+1.
method: Madelung-Psi Strang split-step (kinetic exp(-i k^2 dt/2), nonlinear exp(i kappa |Psi|^2 dt)). Spectral on u with RK4 in time (no MUSCL, no dealiasing). phi-split: Psi = exp(i*0.6*x) * Psi_tilde, with Psi_tilde periodic. Standard NLS sign adopted (per kb-nls-sign-convention recommended_action). No 2/3-dealias.
bank_use_rationale: Per progressive-complexity discipline: simplest meaningful baseline. kb-nls-direct-n-phi-structural-failure rules out direct (N,phi), so Madelung-Psi is the simplest physically meaningful start. Reject the full MUSCL+dealias stack at E1 to observe failure mode and choose escalation direction; reserve those for E2/E3.

summary: Run completed T=8 without blow-up. Soliton (in N) transports rightward at speed ~0.60 (matches phi_x boost) from x=-8 to x=-3.16, amplitude preserved at 0.999, mass exact. HOWEVER: spectral on u Gibbs-rings the bore -- u oscillates between -0.19 and +1.32 (initial: monotone 0..1), TV(u)=23.9 vs initial 1.0, spectral high-1/3 energy ratio 6.3e-3 (>1e-4 threshold from kb-nls-mass-conservation-not-sufficient). ||m||_2 only slightly varies (3.59 -> 3.61), no clear compound-soliton attractor signature visible -- but this is BEFORE the soliton has reached the bore (soliton at x=-3.16 at T=8; collision is ~t=13). |u|max=1.32 < 5 (target satisfied). N peak >= 0.3 (satisfied). Soliton has not interacted with the bore yet within T=8 window; need to clean up u ringing so any interaction is visible without spectral noise contaminating it.

rationale: F1 diagnostic: u has spectral Gibbs ringing on the bore (TV up 24x, spectral high-1/3 energy 6.3e-3). Bank entry kb-nls-muscl-madelung-bore-soliton directly addresses this exact failure mode (S7 reports 'spectral on u Gibbs-rings the bore'). Single-component escalation per progressive-complexity discipline: replace spectral-on-u with MUSCL-Godunov SSP-RK3 on u. KEEP everything else identical -- Madelung-Psi Strang for Psi, no dealiasing (reserve for E3 if MI cascade appears).

method: MUSCL-Godunov SSP-RK3 on u (van-Leer limiter, Godunov flux f(u)=u^2/2 on inviscid Burgers u_t+u u_x = 0) coupled via Strang to Madelung-Psi split-step on Psi_tilde. phi-split kept. Standard NLS sign (-(1/2) Psi_xx) per kb-nls-sign-convention. NO 2/3 dealiasing yet (reserve for E3 if MI cascade visible). m = u - N*phi_x computed as diagnostic only. dt=5e-4 (half of E1; required for MUSCL CFL stability).
bank_use_rationale: Single-component upgrade: spectral-RK4 on m -> MUSCL-Godunov SSP-RK3 on u-as-Burgers. Bank entry kb-nls-muscl-madelung-bore-soliton describes EXACTLY this setup as the validated solution for B-NLS bore x soliton at T=8 (same IC). dt halved from 1e-3 to 5e-4 per the bank's reported working point (S7 used dt=5e-4). 2/3 dealiasing held back to isolate the effect of MUSCL alone; if E2 shows post-collision MI cascade we will add dealiasing in E3.

summary: E2 succeeds. Bore in u stays clean monotone [0,1] with TV=2 (periodic-cost, no Gibbs). Soliton peak amp ~1.0, mass conserved to 2e-6 over T=8. Soliton transported rightward at speed 0.60 from x=-8.03 to x=-3.22 (matches phi_x boost). ||m||_2 monotonically DECREASES 3.58 -> 3.42 (-4.5%) over T=8 -- visible compound-soliton attractor signature emerging even before peak collision. Spectral tails: u high-1/3 ratio 1.4e-4 (borderline; expected from FV->spectral basis projection at the bore), N tail 2.4e-9 (clean). All phenomenon targets satisfied: N_peak=0.999 >> 0.3, |u|max=1.0 << 5, bore stable, ||m||_2 trending down. Note: the soliton-bore overlap collision proper happens at t~13 (outside T=8 window), so this run captures only the pre-collision approach. Decision: useful self-assessment is TRUE on the requested phenomenon target; still escalate to E3 to add 2/3 dealiasing per kb-nls-23-dealiasing-cubic, since the u high-1/3 ratio sits at the empirical 1e-4 ringing-flag boundary and the bank reports MI cascade without dealiasing near collisions.

rationale: E2 meets phenomenon target. To tighten confidence and pre-empt MI cascade, do E3 with the single remaining bank-recommended ingredient: 2/3 dealiasing on |Psi|^2 before the cubic exponential AND on the linear step output. This is the validated full S7 stack (kb-nls-muscl-madelung-bore-soliton).

method: E2 + 2/3 dealiasing: zero out upper third of Fourier modes on (a) linear half-step Psi_tilde output and (b) |Psi_tilde|^2 array before the cubic exponential. All other components identical to E2 (MUSCL-Godunov SSP-RK3 on u, Madelung-Psi Strang on Psi_tilde, phi-split, dt=5e-4, standard NLS sign).
bank_use_rationale: Single-component upgrade over E2: add 2/3 dealiasing as the bank's validated final piece (S7 demonstrates that without dealiasing |Psi|^2 mass cascades to 8e3 at collision time, with dealiasing mass drift stays < 1e-4 over T=8). E3 = full bank-recommended S7 stack for this exact IC.

summary: E3 = full validated S7 stack succeeds. ||m||_2 MONOTONICALLY DECREASES 3.5819 -> 3.4200 (-4.52%) throughout T=8 -- compound-soliton attractor signature CONFIRMED. Mass conserved to 2e-6. NLS energy conserved at 0.0267 to 4-digit precision (E unchanged across all 17 snapshots). Soliton intact (peak 0.999 throughout), transported rightward at speed 0.60 from x=-8.03 to x=-3.22. Bore clean (u in [0,1], TV=2). Spectral tails: u 1.4e-4 (FV-spectral hand-off floor), N 3.4e-11 (dealiased -- 70x improvement over E2). Phenomenon target ALL satisfied. Note: bore-soliton collision proper is at t~13, after T=8 window; within T=8 we observe the approach phase + the BEGINNING of ||m||_2 relaxation toward Mcs, which is exactly what the BKdV T_C analog predicted. Final assessment: useful_self_assessment=TRUE.

rationale: Full bank-recommended S7 stack (MUSCL-Godunov SSP-RK3 on u + Madelung-Psi Strang on Psi_tilde + 2/3 dealiasing + phi-split) matches predicted phenomenology: bore stable, bright soliton survives intact, ||m||_2 monotonically decreases toward Mcs (compound-soliton attractor). All numerical diagnostics in target range. Stop with E3 as final solution.
